approvalText: I approve a one-transaction micro-live engineering proof only. This is not strategy-profit validation, not full live trading approval, and not approval for repeated trading. Maximum trade size is 0.01 SOL. Maximum daily loss is 0.05 SOL. I will be present during execution. Stop after the first transaction.
notes: R43B operator caps approval record. One-transaction engineering proof only. Full live trading NOT APPROVED. R7 edge NOT ENOUGH DATA. Posture remains disarmed until later proof gates.
